title: Senior Frontend Developer at Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Frontend Developer in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
